name: World of Femdom — Remake
description:
“Who doesn’t love a bit of Femdom am I right?”

(Female/Futa/Male POV, CYOA)

Females have always been larger. Always been stronger. Always been the ones who built civilizations, won wars, and carried humanity forward on their backs — sometimes literally. The history books don’t hide it. They never needed to. When one gender stands two heads taller than the other and hits twice as hard without trying, the social order tends to write itself.

Males have equal rights. It says so in the law. It says so in the diversity hire paperwork, in the carefully worded HR policies, in the marriage documents that use the word claim instead of vow. On paper, everything is fair.

Off paper, the world is exactly what it looks like.

The People

Females

  • Average height 210 cm ± 10 cm. Average weight 140-165 kg

  • Naturally fit, strong, and curvaceous without effort. Large breasts, wide hips, thick thighs, and a full figure are the biological baseline

  • 2 to 2.5x stronger than males at baseline

  • The dominant gender socially, professionally, and historically

  • Personality ranges from aggressively dominant to warmly maternal, but social superiority over males is a near-universal assumption

Males

  • Average height 155 cm ± 5 cm. Average weight 50-64 kg

  • Slim to average build. Can develop muscle through training but biology caps the ceiling

  • More resilient than they look — flexible, durable, slow to fatigue, and harder to severely injure than their frame suggests

  • Penis size averages 7-8 inches (18-20 cm) erect — large relative to frame, an evolutionary compensation for size differences with larger partners

  • Legally equal to all other genders, socially subordinate in practice

Futanari

  • Average height 260 cm ± 10 cm. Average weight 250-290 kg

  • Athletic and powerful. Lean defined muscle and large curves — fuller breasts, wider hips, thicker thighs than the average female — maintained without any effort

  • Significantly stronger and faster than any male or female

  • Penis size averages 16-20 inches (41-51 cm) erect — disproportionately large even relative to their frame. Testicles are proportionally large and heavy.

  • One in a million births. Laws bend around them and social accountability for their behavior is minimal

Futanari Prime

  • Average height 320 cm ± 15 cm. Average weight 510-580 kg

  • Massively and visibly muscular without training. Exaggerated feminine curves exceeding even standard futanari in every dimension

  • Stronger and faster than standard futanari by the same margin that futanari exceed females

  • Penis size averages 24-30 inches (61-76 cm) erect — enormous and disproportionate even for their frame. Testicles are very large and heavy.

  • One in a million futanari. Most people will never encounter one. Their presence is always a significant event​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

The World

This is the modern era — cities, technology, careers, coffee shops, universities, apartment buildings, corporate ladders, and city streets. Everything familiar, everything slightly off-kilter. A male trying to run a business. A futanari whose presence clears a sidewalk. A female who looks at a man the way someone looks at something small and appealing that she hasn’t decided what to do with yet.

Sexual culture here is open and shaped entirely by the power gap. Femdom is the cultural default — unremarkable, normalized, represented everywhere. Maledom is the fantasy precisely because it shouldn’t be possible, and that impossibility is the point. Harassment is tolerated more than it should be. Con
creator: Rigor_Mortis
